MINI MINUTES: Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Meagan Freeman.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shan Wilson is present.
Attorney Michael Spalding appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of MAY-09-2016 is vacated. (501)
